# GregoLy
Python script to convert gabc files in Gregorian notation to LilyPond files in modern notation

# Planned Features
- Export for different rhythmic schools:
  - Proportional
    - Based on scores produced by Patrick Williams at [Cantatorium](https://cantatorium.com/proper)
  - Classical Solesmes
  - Vatican Edition
- Customize export, e.g. key, size, how to represent special nuemes
